tools.name: xr_get_session_status
tools.title: Get XR session status
tools.description: Report XR session + device status: device name, whether a session is offered/active, session mode, enabled features, and visibility. Call this first to orient.

tools.name: xr_accept_session
tools.title: Accept XR session
tools.description: Accept an offered XR session (equivalent to the user clicking "Enter XR"). Then poll xr_get_session_status until sessionActive is true.

tools.name: xr_end_session
tools.title: End XR session
tools.description: End the active XR session.

tools.name: xr_get_transform
tools.title: Get device transform
tools.description: Get the position, orientation (quaternion), and euler angles of a tracked device.

tools.name: xr_set_transform
tools.title: Set device transform
tools.description: Set a device position and/or orientation immediately. Requires an active session.

tools.name: xr_look_at
tools.title: Look at a point
tools.description: Orient a device toward an XR-origin-relative world point. Optionally move it to a given distance from the target. Requires an active session.

tools.name: xr_animate_to
tools.title: Animate device pose
tools.description: Smoothly animate a device to a target position and/or orientation over `duration` seconds (default 0.5). Requires an active, rendering session.

tools.name: xr_set_input_mode
tools.title: Set input mode
tools.description: Switch the primary input between motion controllers and hand tracking.

tools.name: xr_set_connected
tools.title: Connect/disconnect input
tools.description: Connect or disconnect a controller or hand.

tools.name: xr_get_select_value
tools.title: Get select value
tools.description: Get the current select value (controller trigger or hand pinch), 0..1.

tools.name: xr_set_select_value
tools.title: Set select value
tools.description: Set the select value (trigger/pinch), 0..1. Use xr_select for a full press+release.

tools.name: xr_select
tools.title: Select (press + release)
tools.description: Perform a full select gesture (fires selectstart → select → selectend) over `duration` seconds (default 0.15). Requires an active session.

tools.name: xr_get_gamepad_state
tools.title: Get gamepad state
tools.description: Get all buttons/axes for a controller (index 0=trigger, 1=squeeze, 2=thumbstick, 3=A/X, 4=B/Y, 5=thumbrest; axes 0=stick-x, 1=stick-y).

tools.name: xr_set_gamepad_state
tools.title: Set gamepad state
tools.description: Set controller buttons and/or thumbstick axes by index.

tools.name: xr_get_device_state
tools.title: Get device state
tools.description: Get a full snapshot: headset pose, input mode, controllers, hands, stereo, FOV.

tools.name: xr_set_device_state
tools.title: Set device state
tools.description: Apply a partial device state. Call with no `state` to reset everything to defaults.

tools.name: xr_set_hand_pose
tools.title: Set hand pose
tools.description: Set a named hand pose (e.g. "relaxed", "point", "pinch") on a hand device.

tools.name: xr_get_world_state
tools.title: Get world state
tools.description: Summarize the emulated environment (SEM): plane/mesh counts and the list of tracked objects with semantic labels. Requires the Synthetic Environment Module.

tools.name: xr_get_objects
tools.title: Get tracked objects
tools.description: List the SEM tracked planes/meshes with their semantic labels (e.g. wall, floor, table).

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.title: Screenshot the browser tab
tools.description: Capture the visible browser tab — the composited frame the developer sees — as an image. Serviced by the extension (captureVisibleTab), so it works on any page regardless of how the WebXR scene is rendered. Defaults to a downscaled JPEG to stay within model image limits; override maxWidth/format/quality if needed.
